case_title: INTERNATIONAL MICRO DEVICES VS NOVO EXPRESS UNIT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,875.00 FILED BY INTERNATIONAL MICRO DEVICES AS TO DEFENDANT NOVO EXPRESS UNIT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL MICRO DEVICES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NOVO EXPRESS UNIT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
